metadata.journal_name: Wake Forest Journal of Business and Intellectual Property Law
metadata.status_reason: Legacy ipjournal.law.wfu.edu does not resolve from this environment. Current PubPub archive exists at jbipl.pubpub.org/print-archive but returns Cloudflare 403 to local smoke requests.

pagination.notes: PubPub print archive is a single archive page when accessible; local requests are blocked before pagination can be crawled.

navigation.notes: Search index confirms PubPub print archive article links, and direct assets.pubpub.org PDFs are reachable, but the archive and pub pages are Cloudflare-blocked to the smoke client.
